title: Animated Ore
description: Animated ores with different variants, and they are emissive.
body:
### Introduction
This resource pack adds refreshed Animated Ore to your Minecraft world. They also have their variants, so there will be not just one, but several block textures. It also offers mod support, for now in a small amount, but in the future there will be added such mod support! They also have support for emissive, which is optional, even if you do not have a mod introducing this functionality will be used from the default resources included in the game. ### Emissive Compatibility ✨
| Mod | 1.21.x | 1.20.x | 1.19.x* | 1.18.x* | 1.17.x* | 1.16.x* | | :----------------------------------------------- | :----: | :----: | :----: | :----: | :----: | :----: | [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) | ⭕ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)| ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ - Mods are officially available.\ ⭕ - Support of this version by this mod is limited. Some versions are supported.\ ❓ - Mods are in early development or have been released as pre-release versions.\ ❌ - The mod is not available in the version or has not yet been released. *Versions marked with `*` indicate end of support.*

Requirements

OptiFine
- Emissive Textures to be enabled. (The default is on.)
Continuity (recommended)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) 0.6.0 or later. - ~~[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)~~ (only older versions of Sodium released <0.6.0) - [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) 0.3.20 or later. - ~~[Lazurite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lazurite)~~ (only older versions of Embeddium released before version 0.3.20) ### Mod Compatibility
| Mod | Supported | | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :-------: | | [Universal Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal_ores) | ✅ | | [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) | ✅ | | [Weeping Angels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weeping-angels-mod) | ✅ | | [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) | ✅ | | [Ancient Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-aether) | ✅ | | More Ore Stones [[Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mores-forge)/[Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/mores)]| ✅ | | [Alex Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) | ✅ | | [Caves and Cliffs (backport to 1.16.5)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/caves-and-cliffs-backport) | ✅ | | [Gems And Crystals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gems-and-crystals) | ✅ | | [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery) | ✅ | | [Clay Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clay-overhaul) | ✅ | | [Actually Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/actually-additions) | ✅ | | [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) | ✅ | | [Oritech](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oritech) | ✅ | | [Mekanism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism)| ✅ | | [Excavated Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/excavated_variants) | ❌ | ✅️ - This mod has native support for this resource pack.\ ❌ - Mod that is incompatible with this resource pack. ### Resource Pack compatibility 📦
| Resource Pack | Supported | | :----------------------------------------------------------------------- | :-------: | | [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)| ✅ | | [Fresh Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-textures) | ✅ |

Action

If you want to load this resource pack from this project another resource pack must be **above**, because it will not work. Here below you have examples. 🔽 ![](https://i.imgur.com/kQmjf5U.png)\ If there was an incompatibility with this resource pack create an issue [here](https://github.com/raspberrygitq/Animated-Ore/issues)
